<!-- walkthrough_start -->

## Walkthrough

This PR modifies `tickHealth` to prevent decay from being applied to fresh profiles—those that have never recorded activity (where `last_signal_at` is null). The implementation adds an early-return guard that exits before decay logic executes. New test coverage verifies that HP does not decay for fresh profiles, both with and without activity, and confirms whether `last_signal_at` remains null or is updated appropriately.

<!-- walkthrough_end -->
<!-- tips_start -->
